title: unsupported_constructs
description: Exercises every JSON Schema construct SchemaConverter cannot map onto DynamicGenerationSchema, one per property.

union.description: A raw predicate string or a structured predicate object.

openBag.description: An object that accepts arbitrary extra keys beyond its declared properties.

dynamicKeys.description: An object keyed by a regular expression instead of fixed names.

pair.description: A fixed-length heterogeneous tuple via 2020-12 prefixItems.

legacyTuple.description: A fixed-length heterogeneous tuple via the legacy draft-07 array-form items.

refWithSiblingAnyOf.description: A $ref with a sibling anyOf, meaningful under 2020-12 applicator semantics but not representable together.
